name: Founder Legal Workspace
description: Three AI legal hires for solo founders at week 0 — a General Counsel (fractional GC, reviews contracts, owns the shared legal context doc), a Paralegal (paperwork, templates, intake, drafts), and a Compliance Ops agent (privacy policy, Delaware franchise tax, 83(b), 409A, DSR clock, trademark knockout). Chat-first, markdown-output, shared legal context doc. Drafts only — never sends, files, or signs anything without founder approval.
